title: Inline Metric Editing from Sidebar with Read/Edit Mode Toggle
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to edit metric details directly in the sidebar panel with a toggle between read-only and edit modes, so that I can view and update metric information in the same workflow without switching to a separate editor.
description:
Moves metric record editing from the data table into the sidebar detail panel. The sidebar defaults to a read-only view showing taxonomy assignments (Line of Business, Topic) as Related/Not Related lists. An Edit toggle switches to an editable mode with dropdowns and text inputs.

Key behaviors:
- Default view is read-only, preparing for a future read-only user role
- Edit mode makes all metric fields (name, description, formula, etc.) editable with auto-focused text inputs
- Taxonomy sections switch to a Related/Not Related pattern — Not Related listed first in edit mode so users can quickly assign new values
- An output/edit mode toggle lets users switch back to read-only after editing
- Changes persist to the database and immediately update the main data table row
- Previous/Next navigation continues to work in both modes
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar defaults to read-only mode showing metric details and taxonomy lists
An Edit button/toggle switches the sidebar to editable mode
In edit mode, metric fields become editable text inputs with auto-focus on click
Taxonomy sections show Related/Not Related lists — Not Related appears first in edit mode
Save/Update button persists changes and updates the main data table row
Cancel button returns to read-only mode without saving changes
Previous/Next metric navigation works correctly in both read and edit modes
Edit mode is disabled for future read-only user roles
ux_changes: Sidebar detail panel gains a read/edit mode toggle. Read mode shows static data and taxonomy lists. Edit mode transforms fields into auto-focused text inputs and taxonomy dropdowns with Related/Not Related ordering. Update and Cancel buttons control the flow.
middleware_changes: Update endpoint for metric detail fields (name, description, formula, etc.) accepting partial updates from the sidebar edit form.
api_changes: PUT endpoint for inline metric detail updates from the sidebar, returning updated data to refresh the main table row.
implementation_notes: The Related/Not Related pattern was flipped in edit mode (Not Related first) based on UX feedback — users want to see unassigned items first for quick assignment. Auto-focus on edit mode fields eliminates a second click to start typing.
comment_summary: Extensive UX discussion about edit/output mode toggle, auto-focus behavior, and making additional fields editable. Developer implemented the edit mode with Update/Cancel flow, Related/Not Related pattern, and verified navigation compatibility. Approved after review.
